name: calendar
description: Read events from the user's macOS Calendar.app, or create a new event. Times are local-time; ISO 8601 like '2026-05-15T14:30:00'.
when_to_use: User asks what's on their schedule, what their day looks like, when they're free, or asks you to schedule an event.
when_not_to_use: Quick 'what time is it' / 'what day is it' questions — those are already in the per-turn now-context block, no skill call needed. For an at-a-glance daily agenda, the calendar.md context report is usually enough.

calendar.description: For mode=create: name of the calendar to add the event to. If omitted, the first writable calendar is used.

events.description: For today: list of {id, summary, calendar, start, end, location, all_day}.

calendars.description: For list_calendars: list of calendar names.

uid.description: For create: the new event's calendar UID.
